title: This AI boom is spilling over.
author: TigerMCU
selftext:
TSMC is on fire! The company just hit a $1 trillion market cap after crushing Q2 earnings, all thanks to massive demand for AI chips. They saw profits soar 61% and revenue jump 39%, and now they're forecasting 30% growth for the year. Nvidia is up over 1% today, and even the ARK Innovation ETF is seeing a slight boost. It's a great day for tech. $WTF is along with this wave and still firm trading at $4.39. 

With the AI trend still at its peak, I don't want to miss out on any opportunities. That's why I see penny stocks as a smart choice right now and not out of .
